'''"Shank" Ballax''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] guard who worked at the prison [[Desolation Alley]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
He was the leader of [[Helmet Squad]]. He was wanted by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] because his activities stymied their flow of money. His bounty was worth 5,000 credits, dead or alive. It was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] during the bounty hunter's search for [[Bendix Fust]], a [[Mordageen]] wanted by [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Sebolto]]. Ballax' removal, whether by death or capture, broke the morale of rioters triggered by [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]], who also sought Ballax.
